meaning: adj.维护和平的 执行(或监督)停火协定的
examples: Peacekeeping, by its nature, makes pre-planning difficult.
British forces have been assigned to help with peacekeeping.
The road is nominally under the control of UN peacekeeping troops.
France wanted to send in a peacekeeping force, but got no support from America or Britain.
Ireland also punches above its weight internationally when it comes to humanitarian assistance, peacekeeping.
